CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Continued To Apr-13-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220

Notice Of Motion To Compel Df A James To Provide Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul Behrend, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Angel Davis
Kristina M. Wertz, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Evelyn Nevilles

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Angel Davis' motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production (set #2).
The motion is moot as responses have been served. The Court finds that defendant failed to respond in a timely fashion requiring the filing of the instant motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $590 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff and defendant. The Court ordered OSC off calendar/good cause. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair CSR# 1170. (212)
